'''tadaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foenumoside|foenumoside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foenumoside|foenumoside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tadaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædæyæth|tædæyæth]] || [[word:tædæyæj|tædæyæj]] || [[word:tædæyæsh|tædæyæsh]] || [[word:tædæyæ|tædæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadadayath|tadadayath]] || [[word:tadadayaj|tadadayaj]] || [[word:tadadayash|tadadayash]] || [[word:tadadaya|tadadaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadayath|tadayath]] || [[word:tadayaj|tadayaj]] || [[word:tadayash|tadayash]] || [[word:tadaya|tadaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadafyath|tadafyath]] || [[word:tadafyaj|tadafyaj]] || [[word:tadafyash|tadafyash]] || [[word:tadafyaf|tadafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadayatha|tadayatha]] || [[word:tadayaja|tadayaja]] || [[word:tadayasha|tadayasha]] || [[word:tadayaka|tadayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadayath|tadayath]] || [[word:tadayaj|tadayaj]] || [[word:tadayash|tadayash]] || [[word:tadaya|tadaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadayathal|tadayathal]] || [[word:tadayajal|tadayajal]] || [[word:tadayashal|tadayashal]] || [[word:tadayakal|tadayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadayathatha|tadayathatha]] || [[word:tadayajaja|tadayajaja]] || [[word:tadayashasha|tadayashasha]] || [[word:tadayaka|tadayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadayathan|tadayathan]] || [[word:tadayajan|tadayajan]] || [[word:tadayashan|tadayashan]] || [[word:tadayakan|tadayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadayathaoro|tadayathaoro]] || [[word:tadayajaoro|tadayajaoro]] || [[word:tadayashaoro|tadayashaoro]] || [[word:tadayakaoro|tadayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
